description: Machine-readable registry for AI agents. Run these tools instead of hand-editing generated output.

tools.title: Run maintainer pipeline profile or step
runWhen: Fetch vendor sources or build native shims

tools.title: Regenerate all bindings
runWhen: Before committing binding or façade work

tools.title: Verify raylib manifest vs vendor headers
Regenerate and fail if committed output differs (CI parity)
List RLAPI symbols in vendor raylib.h missing from manifest
Maintainer pipeline: fetch + native + codegen + drift
Agent gate: codegen drift + build Bindings and Runtime
Run golden image tests (native + QA reports)
tools.command: dotnet run --project codegen/Novolis.Raylib.Pipeline -- run step_01_source && dotnet run --project codegen/Novolis.Raylib.Pipeline -- run step_02_native && dotnet build Novolis.Raylib.slnx -c Release && dotnet test tests/Novolis.Raylib.Golden/Novolis.Raylib.Golden.csproj -c Release --filter Category=Golden -- --maximum-parallel-tests 1

tools.title: Regenerate committed golden baseline PNGs and spec hashes
tools.command: dotnet run --project codegen/Novolis.Raylib.Pipeline -- run maintainer && dotnet run --project tests/Novolis.Raylib.Golden.Seed/Novolis.Raylib.Golden.Seed.csproj -c Release

tools.title: Run unit tests with line coverage (hand-written C# only)
tools.command: dotnet test Novolis.Raylib.slnx -c Release --coverage --coverage-output-format cobertura --results-directory artifacts/coverage --filter Category!=Native

add-raylib-export: Commit manifest + *.g.cs + codegen/pipeline/raylib6/steps/*/result.json and step.log when maintainer ran full pipeline
customize-emitted-csharp: Add or change IRaylibCodegenHook in codegen/Novolis.Raylib.CodeGen.Hooks/
refresh-golden-baselines: Open temp/test-renders QA reports and verify expectations
